# MDE 1.3.18

## Features

- Registers the `mde` command in the background for packaged macOS and Linux installs when no executable `mde` command is already available.
- Keeps app startup non-blocking while checking command registration, and leaves any existing user-provided `mde` command untouched.
- Allows `mde /path/to/workspace` and `mde /path/to/file.md` to open folders and Markdown files from a terminal after registration.

## Bug Fixes

- Makes the editor History button toggle the full deleted-document recovery surface when previewing a deleted document, hiding and restoring both the right history panel and the left Deleted Documents section together.
- Keeps the Deleted Documents section controlled by shared app state so the explorer toolbar restore icon and editor History button stay in sync.
- Gives the manual screenshot E2E flow a longer explicit wait for workspace search results under full-suite concurrency.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Adds unit and integration coverage for the background CLI registration service.
- Adds reducer, shell, explorer, integration, and Electron E2E coverage for deleted-document recovery visibility.

## Documentation

- Updates the Chinese Quick Start manual with terminal launch usage and the non-overwrite behavior for existing `mde` commands.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm audit`
- `npx npm@10.9.7 ci --dry-run`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are published by the GitHub Release workflow.
- Windows NSIS installer artifacts are published by the GitHub Release workflow.
